name: generate-test-cases
description: Given a Forge OpenSpec id, propose a checklist of test cases that exercise each requirement scenario.
body:
# generate-test-cases

This skill turns an OpenSpec into a checklist of testable scenarios an agent can implement.

## When to use

When the user references an OpenSpec id (`spec-7`, `mcp-and-skills`, etc.) and wants test coverage planned before any code.

## How it works

1. Resolve the OpenSpec via the `openspec` MCP (`mcp:openspec.get`).
2. For each `### Requirement` block in the spec, walk every `#### Scenario`.
3. For each scenario, emit one test-case entry with the WHEN/THEN restated as a Given/When/Then triple.

## Output

Markdown checklist suitable for pasting into a PR description or a tracking issue.
